who: HR managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies using BambooHR
offer: For HR managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies using BambooHR processing 5–15 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding causes delayed project starts. We streamline the onboarding workflow instead of manual onboarding processes with multiple spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient onboarding processes lead to delayed project starts.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers seeking solutions
Indie Hackers discussions on similar onboarding challenges
DM outreach to HR managers with onboarding demo video
Community forums for HR managers sharing onboarding tools
try_it: Let users try checklist for onboarding tasks on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the onboarding process
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Reduce steps in the onboarding process
